row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a city street with slight rightward drift or lane change indicated by trajectory lines.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Vehicles on the left and right appear to be moving forward; bus on the right maintains relative position.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during rainy weather. Wet pavement reflects surroundings. Multi-lane road with vehicles in adjacent lanes and parked cars.
semantic.visibility_notes: Rain reduces contrast and clarity. Reflections on wet road obscure some ground details. Pedestrian is partially visible but identifiable.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Objects move smoothly consistent with driving at moderate speed. No sudden jumps or disappearances. Rain streaks and motion blur are temporally coherent.
logical.object_continuity: All major vehicles remain continuously visible across frames. Pedestrian remains in same general area without abrupt displacement.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and infrastructure maintain spatial consistency throughout sequence.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward steadily, maintaining lane position with minor adjustments.
decision.risk_context: Reduced visibility due to rain may require cautious driving. No immediate collision risk observed from surrounding traffic.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene under rainy conditions. Layout and object types match Row 1 closely.
semantic.visibility_notes: Pedestrian is absent or not clearly rendered. Some objects show slight blurring or softening compared to real reference. Overall scene structure preserved.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Temporal flow appears smooth. Object positions evolve consistently with ego motion. Minor artifacts in texture rendering do not disrupt continuity.
logical.object_continuity: Main vehicles persist across frames. Absence of pedestrian is notable but does not break continuity of other objects.
logical.structure_continuity: Buildings, roads, and static structures remain stable and aligned with perspective changes.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward with similar trajectory as Row 1.
decision.risk_context: Scene readability slightly reduced due to generation artifacts and missing pedestrian detail. No overt hazard detected.
